summary: LMS/Training Hub Testing Complete - Backend 100% (16/16 tests), Frontend UI fully functional. All role-based training features working correctly.

test_classes: TestTrainingTracks (4 tests) - Role-based filtering for super_admin, user, partner roles
TestWhiteLabelTrackLessons (2 tests) - White Label track has 5 lessons with content
TestAdminTrainingCRUD (4 tests) - Admin can list, create, update, and modify track roles
TestAdminLessonCRUD (4 tests) - Admin can list, create, update lesson content
TestProgressTracking (2 tests) - Mark lesson complete, progress updates track count

verified_flows: Training Hub page loads with all tracks for super_admin (4 tracks visible)
Track cards show lesson counts and progress bars
Overall Progress section shows aggregate completion
Admin Manage Training page shows all 4 tracks with role pills
Expanding a track shows all lessons with edit/delete icons
Add Lesson button visible in expanded track
Partner Dashboard shows Training Hub button with correct text
Lesson detail view shows full markdown content (headings, lists, blockquotes)
Action Steps section displayed with numbered steps
Mark as Complete button visible and clickable

verified_features: PASS: Training Hub shows role-filtered tracks (super_admin sees all 4, user sees only Sales, partner sees Partner+WhiteLabel)
PASS: White Label Partner Guide track has 5 lessons with full content
PASS: Admin Manage Training page loads at /admin/manage-training with all 4 tracks
PASS: Admin can expand a track to see its lessons
PASS: Admin can edit track title, description, roles (tested via API)
PASS: Admin can edit lesson title, description, content (tested via API)
PASS: Admin can create new tracks (tested via API)
PASS: Admin can add new lessons to tracks (tested via API)
PASS: Partner Dashboard at /partner/dashboard has Training Hub button
PASS: Training Hub lesson detail view shows content with mark-complete button
PASS: Progress tracking - marking lesson complete updates via API
critical_code_review_comments: training.py correctly implements role-based filtering - super_admin and admin see all tracks
training-hub.tsx correctly reads user role from AsyncStorage and passes to API
manage-training.tsx has all CRUD functionality with proper data-testid attributes
Progress tracking persists to MongoDB and updates track completion counts
seed_data_creation: Training tracks are auto-seeded on first API call if database is empty. Tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed tracks/lessons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: LMS Training Hub is fully functional. 4 tracks with 21 total lessons. Role filtering works correctly via API query param. Admin CRUD operations for tracks and lessons all working. Progress tracking stores completion in MongoDB. The frontend reads user role from AsyncStorage.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - not used in training module
